game.title: Where They Fall
game.short_text: Throw the runes and find out what the gods intent

details.title: Where They Fall
details.description:
“Where they fall” is a brief atmospheric story game centered around the art of cleromancy. You play as a Germanic seer, interpreting the will of the gods through the throw of rune pieces. Assist your chieftain in an upcoming conflict with Roman forces and give the best advice possible in order to survive. May Tyr grant you strength!
( ! ) NOTE: If you experience mouse drift or any other issue with the WebGL build, try switching to another browser or try the Standalone Build
Made in 48 hours as a submission to the GMTK GameJam 2022. A thing by Team Manatea and @Flo123147
Credits:Programming - Christopher Bernal (https://twitter.com/TheVastBernie)Design & Narrative - Stefan Kessler (https://twitter.com/EldritchShrimp)2D & 3D Art - Hanna Siek3D Art - Florian MehlichMusic & Sounds - Philipp Norpoth (https://twitter.com/NorpothPhilipp)
Thanks for playing!

game.title: Luck be a Lie
game.short_text: Struggle with dice games? Maybe it would help if the dice were on your side...

details.title: Luck be a Lie
details.description:
Lately, some weird dice game's been making the rounds. Sounds like you... fight people with the dice? And all the dice have weird names and do weird stuff? Not the kinda thing I'd pick up for fun, but seems like there's some money in it if the dice are on your side.
Lucky for me, the dice are always on my side.
_________________________________________________________________________
Choose to roll your dice honestly, or rig the outcome. But be careful - when you force a number, you won't see it on that die again...
_________________________________________________________________________
How to Play:
Mouse - interact with menus by mousing over and left-clicking
In battle, mouse over your dice at the bottom of the screen to choose to ROLL for a random number, or RIG for a fixed number - if you rig a roll, you won't see that number on the die again for the rest of the battleYou can also mouse over the dice floating above the enemies' heads to see what they'll be hitting you with this turn
Space - Skip (in cutscenes) / Pass (in battle - you automatically pass when you've rolled as many dice as you're allowed each turn)
_________________________________________________________________________
A submission for the 2022 GMTK Gamejam - Roll of the Dice
Thank you to everyone who played and rated my game! 26th overall, with an incredible 2nd in creativity - well beyond what I thought I deserved! Rest assured, this won't be the last you hear from Luck be a Lie!

moreInfo.Author: Aria-1834
moreInfo.Tags: Deck Building, Dice, Short, Singleplayer, Turn-based Strategy

game.title: Holonomy
game.short_text: Explore the non-euclidean surface of a die, using the effects of holonomy to solve puzzles.

details.title: Holonomy
details.description:
Play as a pip on the surface of a die, using the effects of Holonomy to navigate a non-euclidean environment to find your spot.
The audio on the web player has some glitches and pops (only some of which are intentional!). This is a known regression of the most recent Godot web versions, and the downloadable versions below do not have this issue.If the game displays as a black cube, reduce the render quality in the settings, or download below to play in high quality.
Made in 48 hours for the 2022 GMTK Game Jam
Theme: Roll of the Dice
Controls:Click inside the window after the game has loaded! Inputs won't register until you do.Keyboard:  A, D or Left, Right: Move  W, Up, or Space: Jump  F or F11: Fullscreen  Enter: MenuController:  Left Stick: Move  A: Jump, Select  B: MenuMobile:  Touch anywhere on-screen to bring up on-screen controls. Handed-ness options in settings! Fullscreen highly recommended - find it in the settings as well.
Post Jam Update: Added widescreen, improved bloom effect, an options menu, quality settings, mobile/touch support, high contrast mode, fixed some problems with Maze, as well as a few other small tweaks :3Dec 2, 2023: The source code has now been released: https://github.com/Fuzzyzilla/Holonomy. Enjoy :3

game.short_text: TYPING is an elegant puzzle game by rolling your dice to print letters.

details.title: TYPING
details.description:
What can you do with a dice? Gambling? No, try to be more elegant! Roll your dice to type!
You need to control the dice with the keyboard (up, down, left, right), plan your path and type the letters in turns to form the target word. (Or just type whatever you like and screenshot it~). Use your spatial imagination and enjoy it!

game.short_text: Not-So-Nice-Dice and the Ghouly Gamblers starring in "Refrain to be nice, Roll the Dice!"
game.title: A Ghouly Gamble (formerly Not-So-Nice-Dice)

details.title: A Ghouly Gamble (formerly Not-So-Nice-Dice)
details.description:
You play Not-So-Nice-Dice, a loaded dice who is frustrated and trapped in their new job. One day they smell a chance to screw over the Ghouly Gamblers at a family-friendly board game. 🎲 👹The game was a submission for the GMTK GameJam 2022 following the theme "Roll of the dice". It even made a short appearance in the video by Mark Brown.How to win?
Each monster has their individual 'Rage-O-Meter' that gets filled whenever something bad happens to their game play ... Your goal is to strategically manipulate the game, so that one of the monsters rage-quit. But be aware of 👀 the authorities that are watching you. 
Controls

Use the arrow keys (or WASD) to cheat on the monster's roll

Special thanks to
Regina for game testingNisi for tutorial testingPedro for translation fixes
The Ghouly Gamblers got together just 30 minutes before the actual game jam began. They collaborated on the concept, the idea and the story. Furthermore, they owned ...

game.title: Minute Matcher
game.short_text: Make snap judgements in this fast paced puzzler

details.title: Minute Matcher
details.description:
Minute Matcher is a fast paced puzzler about quick thinking and making snap judgements. For every round, you are presented with a level, a number, and a time limit. Your job is to figure out, before you play the level, whether or not the smallest possible number of moves needed to complete it is represented by the number. If it is, you solve. If not, you skip the level and roll again.
As you play the timer will get faster and faster. There are also 3 different difficulties with additional level mechanics. Good luck!
Note: The first few screens are just a tutorial so you understand how the game mechanics work
Another note: The game is made so that you are guaranteed a solvable room before you run out of skips, that said some are hard to spot, and if you miss one it is very possible that you won't get a good one before your skips run out! (skips are refilled each time you win a room)

Controls:
Arrow Keys - Select where you want to moveSpace - Make a movementF11 - Full screenHold Esc on title - Quit game

Everyone who contributed:
Serponge, Lumpy - Lead Game Designers and ProgrammingAlterran, Spu7nix - Additional ProgrammersThomartin - Lead ArtistMbed, Darwin, Mels - Lead Level DesignersVermillion, Dysbelief - Additional Level DesignersDevon - Lead Composer & Sound DesignerDominus - Additional ComposerMister M, DavJT - Additional Sound Designers

game.title: DIEmunition
game.short_text: Use falling dice as your platforms… AND as your ammunition.

details.title: DIEmunition
details.description:
Post-jam version #3 is now LIVE with better balancing!For more info, check out our devlog!
_________________________________________________
Welcome to DIEmunition!
The shooter-platformer where you use dice as your platforms… and your ammunition!
Survive by jumping on the falling dice platforms and shooting enemies. But be careful – your gun has no ammo! The only way to shoot is to stand on a die to use the dots on its face as ammunition.
Watch out! Once a die’s bullets are used up, it disappears, leaving you vulnerable to the acid below!
"A great arcade thrill-ride" – Mark Brown, Game Maker's Toolkit
_________________________________________________
Shoot while standing on DICE for special effects:
 BULLET DICE to fire bullets
 HEART DICE to regain health
 POWER-UP DICE to fire heavy artillery
_________________________________________________
TIPS & TRICKS:
Shoot dice while they are falling to lock in their value!
Your positioning matters! Careful where you are shooting from.Use your double jump!
_________________________________________________
CONTROLS:
WASD / Arrow keys MoveW / Up / Space Jump + Double JumpMouseAimLeft ClickShootMMuteRRestart
_________________________________________________
CREDITS:
We are Jamadoo Games:

game.title: Dice is the Way
game.short_text: Roll the dice, this is the way

details.title: Dice is the Way
details.description:
This game is made in 50 hours for the 2022 GMTK game jam. Check the full version (DICEOMANCER) on Steam! 
Dice is the Way is a deck builder roguelike card game with a twist: you can change ANY number on the screen when you using the Roll The Dice card.
Roll the dice, this is the way.
Goal
Beat all 4 monsters.
Instruction
Drag the card to the top half of the screen to play it.After using a dice card, click ANY number on the screen to roll it. ANY NUMBER!
You will draw 3 cards each turn. You can keep up to 5 cards.


Tips
With good strategies, It's easy to overcome the randomness!
Once the number on the card (e.g. action points, effects etc...) get modified, the effect is PERMANENT.It's not that easy! Think strategically! And there are a few different strategies to win the game.Roll a Bigger number means to roll a 20-faces dice, the result will be a number between 1-20.Use the cards you don't need! Otherwise you may only draw two or fewer cards a turn.
Made by
x310: game design & programmingziyi: monster animationRingo: sound & BGM & programming
Alva Peng: card art design
(Remember to check the full version on Steam!)

game.title: Roll of Gaia
game.short_text: A short and simple strategy game where you place dice and gain points.

details.title: Roll of Gaia
details.description:
Roll of Gaia
Made for the GMTK 2022 game jam. The theme was "Roll of the Dice". (hence the dice pun)
Run the earth and place various dice to earn points. Each colour of dice will have their own unique placement rules and effects.  Take advantage of the dice effects and maximize the points you earn to get a high score, before you run out of dice!
How to play:
You are given a deck of dice and your goal is to place them on the board to gain points and EXP. The dice at the bottom is your hand. At the bottom left is your draw pile and at the bottom right is your discard pile. All dice placed on the board are sent to the discard pile.On the left side, there are skill panels: One rerolls the value of the dice you are currently holding, the other discards the dice in your hand. Using a skill will cost one skill point which replenishes every turn.Each dice colour has unique effects and rules. Strategize when and where to place a certain dice to maximize your score  and EXP gain. once enough EXP  is collected, you level up and all the  dice in your discard pile returns to your draw pile.The game only ends once you fully run out of dice, or if the board is full. Earn enough EXP and keep the board clean to survive longer. Try reaching for a high score and have fun.Note: This game is unfinished. A planned post-jam update will flesh the gameplay a little bit more with more content and dice types. If you already enjoy the game and want to see more, do check this game in the future.
Currently known issues:
If you managed to use your last dice, but also level up at the same time, the game will end instead of you being able to continue.
The font size in the how-to-play section and the credits section are too big leading to barely readable text.
No better tutorialization, so far the best way to learn about the game is by trial  and error.
Credits:
Programming/ Game Design:Iced_Lemon (@Iced_Lemon_Draw )Pixel Art:Someguy009 (@SGP009)Soundtrack Composer/ SFX:SlascoplerdSorasu (@slasco_art)Soundtrack Composer:sidedishes (@sidedishf)Special Thanks: Additional SFX by LittleRobotSoundFactory and Grape Soda font by jeti

game.short_text: A Minimalistic Dice Engine Building Game
game.title: Rolling for Royalty

details.title: Rolling for Royalty
details.description:
Yay, this game was featured in The Best Games from GMTK Game Jam 2022! Check out the video here: *It is highly recommended to play this game in full-screen.*
*The game is apparently playable on mobile devices, apart from being able to check what the different faces do, in the shop. I'll post a small grid in this description later to go over these effects.*

Come one and all! Try out this new great experience!
Oh! Hey you! Yes, you! Care to take this here game for a spin? I will walk you through it, no need to worry! Battle enemies, face your greatest fears and... Uhm... Save the princess! Yes. That'll do nicely. Come, come! Take a seat.
Yes, very good. Now, let us begin.
This is Rolling for Royalty. A game all about rolling dice, upgrading dice, acquiring new dice... It's mostly about dice. And you fight wildlife and monsters, that's important too. 
It is your duty to save a kidnapped princess. The Troll and his trusty Lion have terrible plans for her, and it's up to you to stop them!

Created in 48 hours for GMTK Jam 2022 by a solo dev. Rolling for Royalty is a small minimalistic sort-of-roguelike  experience. Let me know what you think. :)

moreInfo.Tags: Dice, engine-building, Indie, Roguelike, Roguelite

game.short_text: Fight against other dice in this short auto battler!
game.title: Ultimate Rollies

details.title: Ultimate Rollies
details.description:
1v1 battles with dice! 
You have a small team of dice that are ready to fight. You and an opponent start with 3 dice, and immediately roll them. After that, each round you get to choose to reroll 1 dice to help increase your overall total. 
Whichever side has the lower total loses HP. (Both sides lose HP if a tie occurs).
Simple!
However, there are a few extra rules at play...
If you roll the minimum or maximum number on your dice, the dice changes!Example: If a d6 rolls a 1, it changes into a d4. If a d6 rolls a 6, it changes into a d8.This can increase all the way up to a d20! Additionally, the new dice immediately rerolls, which means it can transform multiple times a round. Also, if a 1 is rolled on a d4, HP is lost!Every other round, you get to choose between two upgrades that change your dice pretty dramatically. Examples: One dice instantly becomes a d10. All d6's get +2.
If you lose all your HP or cause your opponent to lose all theirs, the game is over.
Note: Press F11 to toggle fullscreen if desired
We made this game in 48 hours in Gamemaker Studio 2 for the GMTK Game Jam 2022, pouring our blood, sweat, and tears into it. All art, music, and sounds were created by us. We hope you enjoy our little game!
After downloading the file, unzip the zip file and double click the .exe. If need be, run as administrator.

Simple racing game made by 3 people for the GMTK 2022 game jam in under 48 hours.
How to play:

! Use WASD + Space to navigate menus (kinda weird I know) !

game.title: Shoot Till You Die (jam version)
game.short_text: How long can you survive before you drop dead?

details.title: Shoot Till You Die (jam version)
details.description:
THIS IS THE JAM VERSION, FULL GAME HERE: https://bleskar.itch.io/shoot-till-you-die-full-gameThe skeleton "Dave Skeletberg" has been woken from his slumber, and he's not happy...
Description
This is a simple shoot em' up. Surivive for as long as possible, but watch out! when the timer reaches 0, the boss spawns. If you defeat the boss, you win the stage. Along the way you can get a bunch of different upgrades and weapons. Combine perks and stats to make your weapons stronger.
Pro tip: When you level up; the killed enemy automatically drops a die. The type of die dropped depends on the type of enemy killed. The die an enemy dropped is often represented by the color of the enemy, red blue or yellow.
Dices
Listed below are the different dices that you can pick up. Theses dices increase your weapons stats, what stat it increases correspond with what color the dice is.
DiceDescriptionRedIncreases damageBlueIncreases fire rateYellowIncreases reload speedPinkGives your weapon a random perk
Perks
The list below shows the perks that you can get on a weapon. Every perk is stackable and you can have a max number of five perks per weapon.
PerkDecsriptionFireSets enemies on fireExplosionYour weapon does extra damage and splash damage when a bullet hitsFreezeMakes an enemy slower until they can't moveVampireRecover HP when an enemy is killedSpreadShoot 2 extra bulletsAmmo CapacityIncreases the amount the weapons ammo capacity by 2
Good luck surviving, you'll need it...

game.title: Abyss Diver
game.short_text: Dive into a eldritch world of dice-rolling dungeons

details.title: Abyss Diver
details.description:
Hunt eldritch horrors, rearrange the environment to your advantage, scavenge for loot and ammo, and dive into the Abyss.Abyss Diver is a rogue-like-dungeon-crawler, except you build the dungeons. make it more challenging for better rewards, synergize dangerous tiles, or optimize it for a quick escape. Find and loot a variety of weapons, attachments, and gear. Survive hellish monstrosities and pray you don't run out of ammo.

Throw and roll tile dice, from there they can be added to your ever growing dungeon, your goal is to reach crystal (diamond icon), which will up the challenge and advance the level. However this is not about simply finding the one clean path to the goal, sometimes tiles wont link up in ways that help you, sometimes you will need to think outside the cube.

- Asset Credits -Menu Music By Will Leamon
Combat Music By Joe Reynolds - Professorlamp- Control Reference -
WASD - MoveMouse - AimSpace - Dash, Hold for long dashE - InteractLeft Mouse - Use Held Item/Drag DIceMouse Wheel - Cycle ItemsR[Hold] - Insert Bullets (Magnum, Shotguns, Etc.)R[Tap] - Swap Mag (Pistol, Smg, Etc.)B - Enter overview

Note: Jam version contains various bugs such as softlocks, difficulty curve issues, and more.

game.title: Drawn Apart
game.short_text: A point-and-click story of chance, fate, and grief.

details.title: Drawn Apart
details.description:
Sometimes I catch a glimpse,In softened waves of blue,My child, my heart ...when I see a smile,I can't help but think of you.
Sometimes these waves fill oceans.And feelings string on every shore,A collections of each memoryAnd every way I wish for more. 
Sometimes I watch for answersBecause each day I call to you.I ask for faith and courageAnd strength...to help me through.
Sometimes I ask for braveryLike dolphins in the deep,Because time moves oh so slowly,And sometimes the road is steep.
Sometimes I want to scream.This was not what I had planned.Why you ever suffered,A mom can't understand.
Sometimes I hear your laughterAnd remember you at play,But My Child I always miss you.Not sometimes, but every day.
 

Sometimes, ©2012 Colleen Ranney
Credits
Story, art, code by HugBugSound effects from freesound.orgMusic licensed from pond5.com

game.title: Roll To Hit (On) [GMTKJam Edition]
game.short_text: A dice flirting game, as submitted to the GMTKJam 2022

details.title: Roll To Hit (On) [GMTKJam Edition]
details.description:
Wouldn't it be nice if the Dice always fell in your favour?
In this game, they can- if you manage a way into their hearts...
Part Strategy-Roguelike, Part Dating Simulator!When the Funky Lich turns all the people in the land into dice-based puns, it's up to you and your newly formed party of adventures to save the day!Use your dice-turned party to defeat dangerous enemies!Form relationships with your dice to make them roll better- or neglect them and make their rolls worse...
Fighting and Loving

The game is played in three phases: Walking on the Map, Fighting and Flirting!After each successful combat encounter you gain a new card in your deck- and a bouquet of flowers to give the the die of your dreams.The better your relationship with a certain dice, the better they roll. But be careful: Neglected dice will try to sabotage you!There is a known bug where the Jealousy-Icon will appear for the wrong dice. As far as we know, this is only a visual bug, though.Managing your cards in the "Card" Menu, accessible from the map, can be the key to success!

Attacks and Effects

Mastering the knowledge of your own abilities is just as important as knowing your enemy. Here are the kinds of attacks you can expect to stumble upon:
Damage - Straight forward. Deals damage to the opponent.Heal - Heals a dice roll amount's worth.Shield - Fills up the user's Shield value. When attacked, the Shield value will take all hits until it hits 0. All Shields will reset back to zero at the start of the user's next turn, though!Energy - On your turn, you can play as many cards as you have in your deck- or as many as you have the Energy to play. Certain attacks will try to suck Energy from their opponents or give themselves more Energy per turn.Dodge - Dodging allows the user to circumvent one attack completely. You can activate multiple dodges to ignore multiple attack! Just beware: Like the Shield, the user's Dodges reset to 0 on their next turn!Steal/Super Steal - Certain Enemies can steal your cards! This powerful tool only has one usage each per combat encounter (although some enemies have multiple "Steal" cards that they can then play once). A variant of Steal, "Super Steal" also adds the stolen card to the Enemy's temporary deck!Poison - A particularly nasty tactic used by strong fighters. Getting poisoned adds a Poison Meter to your heart. At the end of your turn, you'll take damage equal to the Poison Meter! But there's hope: After damaging you, the poison gets weaker, until it disappears. Enemies can still try to add more poison to the wound, though!
Credits
This game was made by Thick As Thieves:
Code, Art, Additional Writing - Luca BaumgartCombat Designer - Emily BaumgartWriting - TabbieWolfAmazing Music by MystSaphyr(also on Twitter) and E.G. Simmons!Emotional Support - Cappy, Lando, AnneAdditional Sounds: https://opengameart.org/content/interface-sounds-starter-pack, https://opengameart.org/content/8-bit-sound-effect-pack-vol-001

game.title: Welcome to Ghostel Casino
game.short_text: Kill the specters with the right dice, survive long enough to be the best casino winner!

details.title: Welcome to Ghostel Casino
details.description:
Challenge yourself in this arcade/strategic game! 
Take control of the dealer at Ghostel Casino table and fight incoming Specters while ranking the highest possible score!
It's a single player game. Beware the first few minutes are easy, use the time to collect points before the situation get hectic!
Each Specter has a strength, hitting him with the exact dice with the same strength will give you more points.
But beware! don't waste your dices, soon enough more Specters will come for you and choosing carefully which dice to throw to a specific Specter is key for a longer survival.
You can gamble by triggering slots machines and a wheel of fortune, but beware if most of the time whose will give you some a nice Bonus, it can also spit out a Malus!
Compare your score with other players in the online leaderboard!
Controls  The game can be played with the mouse and optionally the keyboard.
Move your mouse aimLeft click will throw a diceRight click will shuffle the dice in your left hand.The middle click can be use to force reload a new set of dices in your left hand.On the keyboard you can use 'R' to force reload your left hands
Credits  
Kevin CollinetGrégory Dassibat Julien Foucher Jonathan Gillard Louis Le Brun Olivier LhermiteBénédicte Marcq

game.title: Wurfelspiel
game.short_text: Roll musical dice to create your own unique attack combinations

details.title: Wurfelspiel
details.description:
Würfelspiel is an arena fighter based on an old German dice game. Roll dice and randomly generate aspects of your music to create your own unique attack combination to face a variety of unique enemies! Usually these enemies are docile... what's making them act this way?Listen to the soundtrack on Youtube!
The game seems to lag when played in fullscreen. Also extremely sorry about a few of the UI bugs.

In the 18th century, a Musikalisches Würfelspiel (musical dice game) was used to randomly generate scores, selecting from precomposed segments. Used by Mozart and other legendary composers, the dice game could lead to over 750 trillion unique pieces of music. This game was made in 48 hours for the 2022 GMTK Game Jam under the theme of "ROLL OF THE DICE"
CONTROLS
WASD - Move
Mouse - Aim + Shoot

KNOW YOUR ENEMY!


Credits
Daniel Graves - 3D Artist, Programming, SFX, Violinist and "Otamatonist"
Cathy Xie - 2D Artist, Character design, Animation
Benjamin Wang - Music/Composition

game.title: Dicity
game.short_text: Apparently there's a lot of chance involved in City Planning

details.title: Dicity
details.description:
Use the dice Fortuna hands to you
Build a lovely little town with them! And if Fortuna is not so fond of you, use your infrastructure to give your luck a little boost.
A strong Bond
The mayor has a big duty to fulfill and many family members to disappoint. So - as it always is - he is very willing to hand all his work so someone more organized -  like you. In the meantime he will follow his REAL passion - playing Yahtzee.How to Play
Each round you will be given a set of dice, which you can use to expand your city. Depending on your city you can modify the dice before you place them. Reach the Dicington productivity quota in the 10 given turns, or Mayor Dicington won't be able to practice Yahtzee anymore.
But be watchful of your cities needs and the interaction between clusters, otherwise the Diceington family will catch wind of your deal with the mayor before you can say Yahtzee.
A small Hint
Click on the mayor to get helpful Yahtzee tips and general good advice. Also: Building clusters (same category of building + same number horizontally or vertically placed next to each other) is key!

Two developers had a lot of fun making this for GMTK 2022
Made with Love, Lakritze, Club Mate and Godot ❤️

game.title: Cuffs in... King's Court
game.short_text: PLAY DICE WITH THE KING

details.title: Cuffs in... King's Court
details.description:
Instructions (bear with us!):
    
Move with A and D or your arrow keys.
Dash with the right mouse button.Dash into the die to juggle it.
Aim dice and chips with your mouse. Throw them with the left mouse button.  Throw chips at the die while it's in flight to keep it airborne.
Throw chips at coins and banknotes to collect them.Chips cost $100 each.Beat the dealer's roll (on the right) to win the pot displayed below your money counter.Your die (on the left) is rerolled whenever your die breaks a block.You must meet the $1,000 buy-in before each roll or you will lose!Complete 10 boards to complete the game.
****
Welcome to the King's Court Casino and Hotel.
Take a seat at the table, throw your die into the air, and use casino chips to keep your die airborne; land a roll that beats the dealer's to win the pot. Your dealer today? None other than FUTURE ELVIS -- the King himself. It'll take some hot hands to hang ten with the hound dogs... do you think you have what it takes? You have 10 boards to make it happen.
Created in 48 hours for the GMTK Game Jam in July of 2022, whose theme was roll of the dice.
****
The second production by the Limestock Fishing Company:
Blorengerhymes (Graphics)DonnieDarko (Level design)Jsburg (Programming)Karmelyth (Programming, level design)Redoplus (Audio, voiceover)Saniblues (Programming)Zein (Music)

details.title: Roll With It!
details.description:
Enough is enough! Sam’s sick and tired of playing with her overenthusiastic D&D group. Help Sam challenge her friends to settle it on the battlefield and finally let her get back to studying for exams. Utilize her Dice-Rolling powers to defeat unique, challenging monsters! Each Die has its own effects and number of sides. Hover over the Die to reveal its powers. Click the die to cast your roll on your enemies. With a bit of strategy and luck you just might make it out of this game of D&D alive.
